product: Update request parameters for Delta Sharing recipient audit log events
tagline: For Delta Sharing recipients, deltaSharingProxy audit log events now also include the catalog name request parameter, in addition to share name (previously named share).
what_it_does: For Delta Sharing recipients, deltaSharingProxy audit log events now also include the catalog name request parameter, in addition to share name (previously named share). This page provides a comprehensive reference of available audit log services and events. By understanding which events are logged in the audit logs, your enterprise can monitor detailed Databricks usage patterns in your account.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: For Delta Sharing recipients, deltaSharingProxy audit log events now also include the catalog name request parameter, in addition to share name (previously named share). This page provides a comprehensive reference of available audit log services and events.
key_takeaway: For Delta Sharing recipients, deltaSharingProxy audit log events now also include the catalog name request parameter, in addition to share name (previously named share).
